name: Compass Diversified Holdings 7.875% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Preferred Shares representing beneficial interests in Compass Diversified Holdings
summary: Compass Diversified Holdings 7.875% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Preferred Shares representing beneficial interests in Compass Diversified Holdings represents preferred equity. Compass Diversified Holdings is a company that acquires and manages controlling interests in North American middle market businesses. Preferred shares typically provide a fixed dividend payment.
